removal_criteria: canonical bundles are integrity-equivalent to the legacy bundle set
no running foreign process has the legacy root in its command line
no active MCP configuration points at the legacy root for 30 days

surfaces.surface: repobrief command, rlens-client command and repobrief-mcp-stdio.py
surfaces.canonical: repoground ground, repoground service-client and repoground mcp
removal_criteria: legacy command adapters and launchers are absent from the active repository
all current documentation and examples use canonical commands
the compatibility inventory reports no active legacy command process
the canonical RepoGround CodeQL job has completed successfully on main
the GitHub main ruleset requires RepoGround CodeQL policy (python)
the repository ruleset contract and required-check catalog match the live ruleset
the legacy proxy job is removed in a follow-up commit
the service and clients read only REPOGROUND_* variables and canonical configuration paths
RLENS_* fallback code and tests are absent
the compatibility inventory reports no active legacy environment configuration
no legacy-prefix reads are observed for 30 days
all registered MCP clients use repoground:// resources
a protocol-version note announces removal before release
the merger.lenskit compatibility package is absent
no active repository imports or launches the legacy namespace
canonical import and command regression tests pass
repoground.service is enabled and active
health and authenticated query smoke tests pass
boot persistence is enabled
rlens.service is inactive and disabled
rollback unit content is retained in repository history

surfaces.surface: documented lenskit.*, repolens.* and repobrief.* schema, kind and manifest identities
surfaces.canonical: the exact identifier recorded by the producing schema version
removal_criteria: a new versioned producer and schema exist
paired readers accept old and new versions without reinterpretation
contradiction tests and a rollback path are present
migration is justified by semantics rather than branding
